title: とってもすごいよマーベラス☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I go to watch a scrimmage, when...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, Nature! ☆ Do you think you'll be running as
marvelously as ever tod—mm?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you look down. Are you worried about
today? Are you sick?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, no, I'm fine. Really.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's Teio and McQueen. Looks like they're
competing too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Seems that way.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Go, Teio! I can't wait to see you run!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: You can do it, McQueen! I'm cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The fans are really out in force today, huh? Guess
that's what you get with a superstar lineup.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Nature, you're frowning. Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nope, just business as usual. I always look a little
bitter, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What? No way! You're always shining like a
star! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, some star I am if the best I can ever
get is third place...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Think of it like this. You only have a thirty
percent chance of getting third or better in a race
with ten participants!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Which means not everyone can do that! You're
working miracles!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
W-well, okay, but I sure don't look like I'm
working much at all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the actual stars, I'm not worth
cheering for.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's not true at all! I know I certainly
want to cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Because you never try to put on a big show for
the crowd! You stay true to who you are, and
there's nothing better than just being yourself!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Everyone in the shopping district loves you! They love you because you never try to fake it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You're so miraculous! So fortunate! So happy! So
marvelously marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You should take pride in that! You'll be happier
that way, and so will your fans!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Huh, what's going on with Nature and
Marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ack, everyone's looking at us all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
See? Everyone thinks you're so great! That's why
they're looking at you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, no?! It's because you're so loud!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll tell them what I think! ☆ Nature is so
marvelously marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I get it, all right?! So, just lower your voice
already!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It suddenly feels like an entire month's worth of fatigue is weighing down on me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But, well... I get that you're trying to cheer me
up... Thanks for that.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're not sad anymore! Yaaaay! ☆ I'm
sooo happy! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What did I just say?! Keep your voice down! Ugh!
